title: MT❯Align
content:
MT❯Align gives you on-demand access to a curated roster of top-tier independent lawyers, ready to step in for short-term or specialized legal needs. Whether you’re facing a sudden surge in workload or tackling unfamiliar legal territory, we match you with professionals who bring the right expertise and industry insight to deliver results with confidence.

### Cost-effective and efficient solutions
Our lawyers integrate seamlessly with your team to drive results and achieve business outcomes. We collaborate with you to define scope, tailor cost-effective fee arrangements, and ensure budget certainty, aligning every step with your business goals.
By streamlining operations and empowering your team to focus on high-impact priorities, our lawyers unlock the potential for substantial cost savings and measurable value.
With over 150 MT❯Align professionals across Canada, we offer clients access to a diverse and highly skilled legal talent pool. Our lawyers are carefully selected for their top-tier law firm or in-house experience, subject matter expertise, and alignment with McCarthy Tétrault’s values, ensuring the right fit for your needs every time.
Every MT❯Align lawyer is equipped with access to our training, templates, and tools, ensuring consistent quality and efficiency. Many of our lawyers are McCarthy Tétrault alumni or personally referred by McCarthy Tétrault partners, and each is rigorously vetted and strategically matched to meet your specific needs with confidence.

### Innovation and technology
MT❯Align combines cutting-edge technology with the trusted infrastructure of McCarthy Tétrault to streamline your legal resourcing. We handle all administrative tasks for contracting lawyers, making your experience seamless, efficient, and worry-free.
We offer flexible, high-quality legal resourcing solutions designed to meet your evolving needs. Explore our tailored offerings below.

#### Temporary Placements
Covering short-term leaves, managing overflow work, delivering specialized legal expertise on a flexible basis, or supporting short- and long-term projects.

#### Outsourced Resources
Carrying out overflow work, such as contract services, summaries, negotiations, and drafting commercial leases and reviews; compliance reviews; advertising and marketing reviews; routine corporate matters; and more.

#### Legal Optimization Project Resources
Advancing operational efficiency for your team, such as developing contract playbooks; building templates and tools; reviewing risk management and compliance programs; maintaining and building your knowledge database; and more.

#### Virtual In-house Counsel
Supporting organizations with small or no legal departments or those facing headcount constraints by providing flexible, part-time or temporary legal talent to manage your day-to-day legal needs.
Discover how MT❯Align can deliver flexible, high-quality legal support tailored to your needs.
- Linda Beairsto President, MT❯Align Toronto +1 416-601-8268 lbeairsto@mccarthy.ca
lbeairsto@mccarthy.ca
